proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=96, 94.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +41.1pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8815 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=96, wr=94.7%, edge +41.1pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +41.1pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (shifting, 6 days) with 85.71% Choppy exposure across 91 open positions, so activation is deferred and existing concentration is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-06-12) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type + by_signal_type×regime×sector = Choppy regime (85.71%); UP_TRI signal (90.1%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell (21.98%) (85.7%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type + by_signal_type×regime×sector = Choppy regime (85.71%); UP_TRI signal (90.1%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell (21.98%); recommended action: Pause new entries in signal_type=UP_TRI AND sector=Bank until Bank share drops below 20% via natural Day-6 exits; also pause new UP_TRI additions broadly until Choppy regime share drops below 80% or cohort tier promotes from Candidate.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire 88-position long book simultaneously with no statistical edge justification; Bank-sector shock (rate decision, NPL print) would compound losses given 23% sector concentration overlapping with the dominant UP_TRI×Choppy cell.

evidence: Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort only at Candidate tier (n=188) — unvalidated edge
Bank sector alone holds 21/91 = 23.1% of book
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.concentration_value: Choppy regime (85.71%); UP_TRI signal (90.1%); UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell (21.98%)
decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in signal_type=UP_TRI AND sector=Bank until Bank share drops below 20% via natural Day-6 exits; also pause new UP_TRI additions broadly until Choppy regime share drops below 80% or cohort tier promotes from Candidate.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire 88-position long book simultaneously with no statistical edge justification; Bank-sector shock (rate decision, NPL print) would compound losses given 23% sector concentration overlapping with the dominant UP_TRI×Choppy cell.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Regime concentration triggered at 0.8571 (Choppy, above 0.80 threshold) AND UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell breaches the 0.20 cell threshold at 21.98%. UP_TRI also dominates signal mix at 82/91 = 90.1% (above 0.85 threshold) with the book overwhelmingly directional long (UP_TRI + BULL_PROXY + UP_TRI_SA = 88/91 = 96.7%). Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=188) — unvalidated edge across all concentration cells.
